queue.task: Evening C: Review Session B accomplishments (1882+ tests!). Pick 1-2 evening goals. Bias toward EXPLORE/depth.
queue.summary: Reviewed Session B (1882+ tests). Evening goals: (1) HenryDB window function depth - investigate existing executor, (2) EXPLORE curiosity project. Bias toward depth.
PLAN: Lambda Calculus interpreter - pure exploration project. Parser, evaluator, Church encodings, Y combinator, de Bruijn indices. 2 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: Build a Lambda Calculus interpreter from scratch - parser, evaluator, Church encodings, Y combinator, de Bruijn indices, normal-order reduction
queue.summary: Lambda Calculus interpreter from scratch: tokenizer, parser (multi-param, left-assoc app), capture-avoiding substitution, 4 reduction strategies (normal/applicative/CBV/CBN), de Bruijn indices, alpha-equivalence, Church encodings (booleans, numerals, pairs, lists), Y/Z combinators, step tracing. 104 tests, 0 failures.

queue.task: Write stress tests and explore computability: factorial, fibonacci, pairs, lists all in pure lambda calculus
queue.summary: Computability tests: Fibonacci via Church pairs, SKI combinators (I=SKK, composition=S(KS)K), Scott-encoded naturals, boolean logic completeness (AND/OR/XOR/NAND/IMPLIES truth tables), divergence detection, stress tests (mult 4*5, exp 2^5=32), fixed-point combinators (Y, Turing theta). 55 new tests, 159 total. Found Church exp 0-exponent quirk.
Git pushed, dashboard healthy, scratch note (lambda-calculus-quirks.md), daily log updated.

EXPLORE: Built SKI combinator calculus module. Abstraction elimination (Turner algorithm), optimized with B/C combinators, SKI graph reduction, Unlambda notation, size metrics, Church numeral equivalence verification. Omega divergence test. 49 new SKI tests, 208 total across all lambda-calculus modules.

queue.task: Lambda calculus depth: what is the hardest reduction case? Can we build a simply typed lambda calculus?
queue.summary: THINK: Chose Simply Typed Lambda Calculus (STLC) as next extension. Type checker + strong normalization. Connects to type-inference project.

queue.goal: Build simply typed lambda calculus with type checker

queue.task: Build STLC: type AST (Bool, Int, Arrow), typed terms, bidirectional type checker, type environments, let-bindings, if-then-else. Tests for well-typed and ill-typed terms.
CPS transformation: compile lambda calculus to continuation-passing style. A-normal form. Test CPS equivalence with direct evaluation.
